title: Binary Serialization with Protobuf
description: Analyze the wire-format efficiency and field numbering of Protocol Buffers. Compare the performance gains of binary serialization with Protobuf over JSON. Design .proto schemas for efficient data exchange in microservices.
objectives: Analyze the wire-format efficiency and field numbering of Protocol Buffers.
Compare the performance gains of binary serialization with Protobuf over JSON.
Design .proto schemas for efficient data exchange in microservices.
